summary: Diff adds frontend deduplication utility and applies it to both story and credits panels with a user-facing English toggle, plus a comic-inspired theme. Backend also adds a Motoko deduplication method. However, there’s no evidence deduplication is applied to any export flow, and several unrelated features/branding elements were introduced that weren’t requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deduplication is applied to generated comic content before exporting (in addition to rendering).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows deduplication applied in UI rendering (ComicViewer) and provides a backend deduplication function, but there is no evidence of any export pipeline or that deduplication is applied during export.

hallucinated_features.description: Hard-coded Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse specific branding/content (title, subtitles, fixed script lines, credits).
hallucinated_features.reason: The request is about preventing repeated dialogue/panels in generated comic content, not adding a specific Spider-Man viewer with fixed content.
REQ-3 asks for a coherent comic-inspired theme and to avoid blue/purple as primary; it does not request a theme switcher or system-theme support.
No notification/toast requirement is mentioned in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity + actor/react-query plumbing (useActor/useQueries) beyond repetition removal UI.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not ask to add authentication plumbing or react-query hooks as part of deduplication/theming work (and non-goals mention no third-party auth beyond II, but II itself wasn’t requested here).

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; adds external promotional attribution.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend deduplicateComicText traps on empty input array.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 does not specify trapping/erroring on empty input; frontend mutation even anticipates returning an empty array, suggesting inconsistency.
